channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Real Salt Lake aims to keep winning as San Diego FC visits for the first time
item.description: Real Salt Lake returns to action at America First Field on Saturday night, facing MLS expansion side San Diego FC for the first time. Coming off a commanding 2-0 win over Seattle last weekend, RSL looks to build momentum and keep their shutout streak alive in front of their raucous home crowd.
item.dc:creator: Matthew Casey, ABC 4

item.title: Germans hold 1-2-3 spots midway through 2-man world bobsled championship, with US in medal hunt
item.description: LAKE PLACID, N.Y. (AP) — Take the season's biggest races in the sliding sports of bobsled, skeleton and luge, meaning either the Olympics or the world championships, and there have been 59 instances of sliders from one place sweeping the podium. Austria did it twice. Poland did it once.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Sweet Sixteen: Liverpool's lead in Premier League grows to 16 points as ailing Man City loses again
item.description: Liverpool's lead in the Premier League has grown to 16 points. Mohamed Salah's lead in the Golden Boot contest is up to seven goals.
item.dc:creator: STEVE DOUGLAS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Barcelona's Spanish league game is postponed after death of team doctor
item.description: BARCELONA, Spain (AP) — Barcelona’s home game against Osasuna in the Spanish league was postponed on Saturday after the death of a first-team doctor. Fans were informed of the decision around 15 minutes before the game was scheduled to kick off at 9 p.m.
item.dc:creator: JOSEPH WILSON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Detroit Tigers sign right-hander José Urquidy to a $1 million, 1-year contract
item.description: The Detroit Tigers have signed right-hander José Urquidy to a $1 million, one-year contract that includes a club option for the 2026 season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Barcelona soccer game postponed after team doctor dies
item.description: Barcelona FC's game against Osasuna on Saturday was postponed after first-team doctor Carles Miñarro Garcia died at just 50 years of age.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Xavier Worthy's attorneys release statement after Chiefs star's arrest on family violence charge
item.description: Xavier Worthy was arrested on a domestic violence charge, but his attorneys claim he was a victim of bodily harm. The lawyers also said the allegations made against him were "baseless.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ejiofor's buzzer-beater in OT gives No. 6 St. John's an 86-84 win over No. 20 Marquette
item.description: Zuby Ejiofor hit a tiebreaking shot at the buzzer, Kadary Richmond got the first St. John’s triple-double this century and the sixth-ranked Red Storm beat No. 20 Marquette 86-84 in overtime for their sixth consecutive victory.
item.dc:creator: Steve Megargee, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Brad Marchand plays for the Florida Panthers. It's a move that the Panthers never saw coming
item.description: Aleksander Barkov looked across the Florida Panthers’ locker room on Saturday morning and noticed a new addition.
item.dc:creator: Tim Reynolds, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Chiefs receiver Xavier Worthy is arrested in Texas on a family violence assault charge
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — Kansas City Chiefs rookie Xavier Worthy has been arrested on a felony domestic violence charge, the second high-profile wide receiver from the reigning AFC champions to be facing serious legal trouble in Texas in less than a year.
item.dc:creator: JIM VERTUNO and DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Chiefs' Xavier Worthy arrested in Texas on assault charge
item.description: Kansas City Chiefs wide receiver Xavier Worthy was arrested in Texas on Friday for an alleged assault, according to online jail records.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Nikola Jokic makes NBA history with 30-20-20 triple-double in Nuggets' OT win over Suns
item.description: DENVER (AP) — Nikola Jokic sat in front of his locker, calmly scrolling through his phone, seemingly unimpressed that 30 minutes earlier he made NBA history.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL KELLY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Connor Bedard scores in overtime to lift Blackhawks to 4-3 win over Utah
item.description: Connor Bedard scored 3:10 into overtime to give the Chicago Blackhawks a 4-3 victory over the Utah Hockey Club on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Charles Barkley calls Canadians 'fools' for breaking Wayne Gretzky's heart over Trump friendship
item.description: Charles Barkley took aim at Canadians who have been critical of NHL legend Wayne Gretzky over his friendship with President Donald Trump, calling them fools.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Kenwood girls and boys basketball squads looking to make school history together
item.description: The Kenwood Girls Basketball team defeated Alton 61-55 Friday afternoon at the IHSA Class 4A semifinal to advance to the school’s first state championship game.
item.dc:creator: Josh Frydman, WGN 9

item.title: Falcons' Kirk Cousins visits President Trump at White House
item.description: President Donald Trump and Atlanta Falcons quarterback Kirk Cousins met in the Oval Office at the White House Friday and posed for a photo to remember it.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: No. 21 Saint Mary's heads into March Madness seeking 2nd straight WCC Tournament title
item.description: MORAGA, Calif. (AP) — In the fast-changing world of college basketball, some things remain constant. Saint Mary's, the small school in San Francisco's East Bay region, keeps piling up wins at the rate that only the blue bloods of the sport can match.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: IOC’s Bach sees ‘new world order’ ahead of LA Olympics and says Trump will 'fully support' Games
item.description: LAUSANNE, Switzerland (AP) — Thomas Bach says he feels a rare calm in his final weeks as IOC president even as a “new world order" gains speed ahead of the 2028 Los Angeles Olympics.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM DUNBAR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Shorthanded Jazz lose to last place Wizards, 125-122
item.description: WASHINGTON, D.C. (ABC4 Sports) - Kyshawn George scored 23 points, Alex Sarr added 21 and the Washington Wizards edged the Utah Jazz 125-122 on Wednesday night in a battle of two last place teams.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Green Day's Billie Joe Armstrong, rapper Too Short join Oakland Ballers' ownership group
item.description: (KRON) -- East Bay rap icon Too Short and Green Day frontman Billie Joe Armstrong are getting behind the Oakland Ballers. The team announced on Wednesday that the two internationally renowned musicians -- both of whom have East Bay roots -- will be joining the team's ownership group.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Baseball: Santa Fe Christian 3. Valhalla 2
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Baseball first game of the season for Santa Fe Christian who won a low scoring game against Valhalla 3-2. Eagles were paced by sophomore Kyle Plasman, young man was on a good one out the gate, 3 for 4 with three doubles. A fantastic pitching performance by senior Kam Lohse.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Shoeless Joe Jackson's personal scrapbooks hit auction
item.description: There are about 118 pages in the scrapbook that contain various newspaper articles, box scores, summaries of baseball games and photographs of Jackson mounted to the pages.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, NewsNation

item.title: Bears prospects to watch at the NFL Scouting Combine: Offensive line
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS, Ind. (WGN) — It's the final day of workouts at the NFL Scouting Combine, and Sunday's position group is the one with the most buzz around them when it comes to the Chicago Bears—offensive line.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: BYU wins sixth straight, cruising past West Virginia
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Fousseyni Traore recorded the 21st double-double of his career on Saturday evening as No. 25 BYU defeated West Virginia 77-56 in front of a sold-out Marriott Center. “It was an ultimate tale of two halves," head coach Kevin Young said.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Going through the NFL combine, Jack Bech inspired by brother killed in New Orleans attack
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Jack Bech grew up in Lafayette, Louisiana, hoping to emulate his older brother. It didn't matter he was playing football games against Tiger's friends, most of whom were five or six years older, significantly bigger and more polished players than he was.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, NewsNation
